items.title: Our mic icon just got way better on Android and iOS!
items.title_zh: 我们的麦克风图标在 Android 和 iOS 上变得更好了！
items.description: Our mic icon just got way better on Android and iOS! This is HUGE for non-English speakers. + now 70+ languages + mix languages freely + don't have to change language settings + still doesn't interrupt you :) https://t.co/KQuUyC52fl
items.description_zh: 我们的麦克风图标在 Android 和 iOS 上变得更好了！这对于非英语国家来说是巨大的。 + 现在有 70 多种语言 + 自由混合语言 + 不必更改语言设置 + 仍然不会打扰您:) https://t.co/KQuUyC52fl

items.title: Want unreleased @GeminiApp features before anyone else?

items.title: A sandbox A function A server A build Are you getting it!?
items.title_zh: 一个沙箱一个功能一个服务器一个构建你明白了吗！？
items.description: A sandbox A function A server A build Are you getting it!? These are all expressions of the same underlying compute infrastructure. With tweaks to load balancing, concurrency, persistence, overcommit… 2026 is the year serverless and server…
items.description_zh: 一个沙箱一个功能一个服务器一个构建你明白了吗！？这些都是相同底层计算基础设施的表达。通过对负载平衡、并发、持久性、过度使用等方面的调整……2026 年是无服务器和服务器的一年……

items.title: One of our most requested features, longer Vercel function runtime, is here.

items.description: One of our most requested features, longer Vercel function runtime, is here. What looks like an innocent tweak of a constant… is actually the conclusion a multi-year compute platform investment. Builds, Sandbox, and now Functions run on ou…
items.description_zh: 我们最需要的功能之一是更长的 Vercel 函数运行时间。看起来像是对常数的无害调整……实际上是多年计算平台投资的结论。构建、沙盒，现在函数可以在您的设备上运行...
